hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday range ladder acceptance rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: This is not C0054 late-session inventory unwind, C0053 opening range retest, C0052 orderflow dislocation recovery, C0051 gap continuity decay, C0050 volatility transfer, C0049 execution-path resilience, or older round-level, VWAP, pivot, range-energy, calendar, spread-friction, or retry work. It tests normalized intraday range-fraction ladder transitions around the current day's 25, 50, and 75 percent range rungs, using acceptance, dwell, failed recross, cross impulse, range expansion, compression, volume confirmation, and spread stress. It is not a threshold, window, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, materialization, ONNX, or retry-only nudge.

notes: MT5 validation remains mandatory even if proxy KPI is weak.
Schedule replay does not create runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live authority.
